texto: How Many Lumberjacks Does it Take to Ravish, Maim and Kill Five Feisty Female Co-eds?Read 'Lumberjacked' by Rich Bottles Jr. to find out!Lumberjacked: A Supernatural Tale of Murder and Mayhem in the Mountain State.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Rich Bottles Jr. que provoca temas ligados a reflexao. Ao questionar “How Many Lumberjacks Does it Take to Ravish, Maim and Kill Five Feisty Female Co-eds?Read 'Lumber…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, advertisement, murder, com foco em murder.
